org.bukkit.entity.EnderCrystal

Packages that use EnderCrystal
Package
Description
org.bukkit.boss
Classes concerning the creation of boss bars that appear at the top of the player's screen.

  • Uses of EnderCrystal in org.bukkit.boss

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<EnderCrystal>
    DragonBattle.getHealingCrystals()
    Gets the EnderCrystals on top of the pillars that heal the dragon.
    @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<EnderCrystal>
    DragonBattle.getRespawnCrystals()
    Gets the EnderCrystals being used to respawn the dragon.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    DragonBattle.initiateRespawn(@Nullable Collection<EnderCrystal> crystals)
    Try to initiate a respawn sequence to summon the dragon.
